name: Shanghai Duck
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Star anise, Broken into 16 sections
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the scallions, star anise and gingerroot in a heavy pot.
2. Place the duck, breast side up in the pot.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients (dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, water, sugar, and honey) in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the duck.
5. Cover and bring to a boil.
6. Simmer for about two hours or until tender, turning every half-hour.
7. Remove the duck from the pan and place it on a shallow dish.
8. Rub honey on the duck.
9. Place the duck in a 400 degree oven just until crispy, but not too long.
10. Remove the duck and chop into small pieces.
11. Reserve the liquid and serve at the table as a sauce. Sometimes, thicken it a little, but most of the time, serve it as is.
